title: Genre
documentation:
## Purpose

Genre specifies the literary or content category of the text to be generated, guiding the model toward appropriate structural and stylistic conventions for that form.

## When to use

Use this media type as an input to creative or editorial writing nodes. Combine it with [Tone](https://capdag.com/browse/media:tone;textable) and [Creativity Level](https://capdag.com/browse/media:creativity-level;textable;numeric) to fully shape the character of the output.

## Notes

The allowed values span a range from purely creative forms (fiction, poetry) to professional forms (technical, academic, marketing). Choose the value that best matches the intended audience and publication context.
